title: Allow manual segmentation phase 1 editor when segmentation artifact exists but source text is empty
notes: Low-hanging UI/flow inconsistency: manual top-level showed the Manual segmentation phase 1 control for imported picture-dictionary projects, but clicking it failed with 'requires source text' even when segmentation_phase_1 artifact existed. Fixed by making manual_segmentation_phase_1 derive base text from existing segmentation_phase_1 payload when source text is blank, and only error when both source text and artifact are absent.
